provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male ship galley chief in his 40s with thick forearms and a shaved head, wearing a stained off-white shipboard galley apron over grey thermal work clothes, the apron has scorch marks from a galley fire two tours ago and protein paste stains that autoclave cannot fully remove, a towel tucked into the apron string, rubber-soled anti-slip galley clogs, a cheap ship-issue digital chronometer on his wrist, rolled-up sleeves showing a faded tattoo of a vessel registry number on his inner forearm, he feeds thirty crew from a galley the size of an airlock
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Apron in ship galley. Industrial kitchen feel.
